title: 1X begins production of NEO humanoids in California facility
title_zh: 1X begins production of NEO humanoids in California facility
abstract:
1X has launched full-scale production at its 'NEO factory,' bringing vertically integrated humanoid robot manufacturing to the U.S. 
 The post  1X begins production of NEO humanoids in California facility  appeared first on  The Robot Report .
abstract_zh: 1X has launched full-scale production at its 'NEO factory,' bringing vertically integrated humanoid robot manufacturing to the U.S. The post 1X begins production of NEO humanoids in California facility appeared first on The Robot Report .
